## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly leadership sync to align on key issues, raise concerns, and determine action items across the company.](https://fathom.video/share/xuX_vKssYsx8GMzfYxxyoA_Bu3rgDz_D?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pod transitions underway; Kyle working on documentation and gradual handover to new team members](https://fathom.video/share/xuX_vKssYsx8GMzfYxxyoA_Bu3rgDz_D?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Project management tool decision needed; team to evaluate Notion vs Basecamp options](https://fathom.video/share/xuX_vKssYsx8GMzfYxxyoA_Bu3rgDz_D?tab=summary&timestamp=2747.0)
  - [Engineering hiring ramping up with 2 new positions posted this week](https://fathom.video/share/xuX_vKssYsx8GMzfYxxyoA_Bu3rgDz_D?tab=summary&timestamp=3094.0)
  - [Need to determine right ratios for pod structures and supporting functions as company scales](https://fathom.video/share/xuX_vKssYsx8GMzfYxxyoA_Bu3rgDz_D?tab=summary&timestamp=3240.0)
  - [AirOps relationship evolving; team developing strategies to mitigate risks and maintain client relationships](https://fathom.video/share/xuX_vKssYsx8GMzfYxxyoA_Bu3rgDz_D?tab=summary&timestamp=3660.0)

## Topics

### Pod Transitions

  - [Kyle documenting processes and socializing changes with team members](https://fathom.video/share/xuX_vKssYsx8GMzfYxxyoA_Bu3rgDz_D?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Rough timeline: introduce new folks on calls this week, ramp up next week, official turnover in new year](https://fathom.video/share/xuX_vKssYsx8GMzfYxxyoA_Bu3rgDz_D?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
  - [Creating transition docs for account handovers](https://fathom.video/share/xuX_vKssYsx8GMzfYxxyoA_Bu3rgDz_D?tab=summary&timestamp=1670.0)
  - [Goal is to get Kyle off direct account management ASAP to focus on higher-level tasks](https://fathom.video/share/xuX_vKssYsx8GMzfYxxyoA_Bu3rgDz_D?tab=summary&timestamp=2524.0)

### Project Management Tool Decision

  - [Team debating between continuing with Notion vs switching to Basecamp](https://fathom.video/share/xuX_vKssYsx8GMzfYxxyoA_Bu3rgDz_D?tab=summary&timestamp=2747.0)
  - [Key issues with Notion: weak task management, lack of proactive notifications](https://fathom.video/share/xuX_vKssYsx8GMzfYxxyoA_Bu3rgDz_D?tab=summary&timestamp=2752.0)
  - [Basecamp pros: more opinionated structure, better for long-lived projects](https://fathom.video/share/xuX_vKssYsx8GMzfYxxyoA_Bu3rgDz_D?tab=summary&timestamp=2747.0)
  - [Action: Marcel and Jimmy to write opposing viewpoints to evaluate options](https://fathom.video/share/xuX_vKssYsx8GMzfYxxyoA_Bu3rgDz_D?tab=summary&timestamp=2900.0)
  - [Considering hiring consultant to implement chosen solution and train team](https://fathom.video/share/xuX_vKssYsx8GMzfYxxyoA_Bu3rgDz_D?tab=summary&timestamp=2573.0)

### Engineering Updates

  - [Posting 2 new positions: full-stack dev for AirTable/AirOps replacement, backend dev for API work](https://fathom.video/share/xuX_vKssYsx8GMzfYxxyoA_Bu3rgDz_D?tab=summary&timestamp=3094.0)
  - [Marcus joining as senior full-stack engineer to work on AI/prompt engineering](https://fathom.video/share/xuX_vKssYsx8GMzfYxxyoA_Bu3rgDz_D?tab=summary&timestamp=3156.0)
  - [Building custom platform to replace AirTable; aiming for demo-ready by mid-January](https://fathom.video/share/xuX_vKssYsx8GMzfYxxyoA_Bu3rgDz_D?tab=summary&timestamp=3134.0)
  - [Working on financial projections and capacity planning models](https://fathom.video/share/xuX_vKssYsx8GMzfYxxyoA_Bu3rgDz_D?tab=summary&timestamp=3240.0)

### AirOps Strategy

  - [Developing approaches for accounts wanting workflows in their AirOps instance (e.g. Tyro, Hagen)](https://fathom.video/share/xuX_vKssYsx8GMzfYxxyoA_Bu3rgDz_D?tab=summary&timestamp=3660.0)
  - [Options include:](https://fathom.video/share/xuX_vKssYsx8GMzfYxxyoA_Bu3rgDz_D?tab=summary&timestamp=3660.0)
    1.  Using API calls to trigger our workflows without exposing full IP
    2.  Providing simplified versions of workflows directly in client accounts
    3.  Balancing visible usage in client accounts while protecting IP
  - [Preparing contingencies in case AirOps relationship deteriorates further](https://fathom.video/share/xuX_vKssYsx8GMzfYxxyoA_Bu3rgDz_D?tab=summary&timestamp=3723.0)

### Hiring and Recruiting

  - [Need to determine hiring needs for February capacity ASAP](https://fathom.video/share/xuX_vKssYsx8GMzfYxxyoA_Bu3rgDz_D?tab=summary&timestamp=4320.0)
  - [Likely need at least 1 managing editor and 1-2 account managers](https://fathom.video/share/xuX_vKssYsx8GMzfYxxyoA_Bu3rgDz_D?tab=summary&timestamp=4320.0)
  - [Marcel to continue running hiring process with Molly's help; Kyle to be involved in final stages](https://fathom.video/share/xuX_vKssYsx8GMzfYxxyoA_Bu3rgDz_D?tab=summary&timestamp=4260.0)
  - [Considering full-time recruiter to manage increased hiring needs](https://fathom.video/share/xuX_vKssYsx8GMzfYxxyoA_Bu3rgDz_D?tab=summary&timestamp=4346.0)
